title: fdv3.1 SQL Summary Top 10 By Severity v2

list.name: dbname
list.label: Database
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT dbname AS value, dbname AS label
  FROM awr_sql_summary_mv
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT instance AS value, instance AS label
  FROM awr_sql_summary_mv
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.name: start_snap
list.label: Start Snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_sql_summary_mv
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

list.name: end_snap
list.label: End Snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_sql_summary_mv
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

options.content: ⬅ Return to Navigation  |  , 🔄 Reset Filters, ⬅ SQL Text Viewer  |

### Severity Score Calculation

The score is a composite metric combining:
- **Elapsed Time per Exec (s)** (weight 25%) | **CPU Time per Exec (s)** (weight 25%) | **Buffer Gets per Exec** (weight 15%) | **Disk Reads per Exec** (weight 10%) | **User I/O Wait per Exec (s)** (weight 10%)
- **Unoptimized Reads per Exec** (weight 5%) | **Parse Calls** (weight 5%) | **Cluster Wait Time per Exec (s)** (weight 5%)

> Higher score indicates greater severity (performance issue).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT sql_id,severity_score,
       executions,
       elapsed_time_per_exec_s,
       cpu_per_exec_s,
       user_io_wait_per_exec_s,
       buffer_gets_per_exec,
       disk_reads_per_exec,
       unoptimized_reqs_per_exec,
       parse_calls,
       cluster_wait_time_per_exec_s
FROM awr_sql_summary_mv
WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
  AND instance = '$instance'
  AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int
ORDER BY severity_score DESC
LIMIT 10;
